scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:backend -- --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=80 && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e
